title: glycosmis angustifolia
intro: Glycosmis angustifolia is a species of plant in the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the narrow-leaved Glycosmis or the Glycosmis plant. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Glycosmis angustifolia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
